comment.body:
Meta was widely expected to beat given that they have a captive user base and ads business is less impacted with tariffs. Also Meta is building a massive super general intelligence team and will also launch products targeting enterprise AI very soon. Even if a correction comes can totally see Meta bouncing back very hard. 

If tomorrow Amazon and Apple beat and Friday NFP comes weaker, market will continue to squeeze higher. That 10% correction might have to wait until August Opex.
